products.name: Battery Management System (BMS) and PCM
products.descriptor: BMS and protection circuit module for cell balancing, over/under-voltage protection, and battery life extension

evidence.snippet: [A BMS ensures cells are balanced amongst themselves in order to optimise battery capacity, protect against under-voltage and overvoltage, guarantee optimum safety and extend battery life.](/battery-management-system-pcm/)

Enix Power Solutions are surrounded by specialists in all technologies who enable us to produce reliable, efficient products based on our customers’ expectations. Not only do we supply our own range of [NX™ batteries](/nx-batteries/), we also work with world leading battery manufacturers. Learn more about our different partners and the solutions they provide below.

products.name: Custom Battery Packs for Marine, Subsea & Oceanographic
products.descriptor: Bespoke battery packs for marine, subsea, and oceanographic applications

evidence.snippet: [For nearly 30 years, we have been designing and manufacturing batteries for seabed measurements but also for controls on board merchant ships and military ships.](/oceanographic-marine-subsea/)

evidence.snippet: Mascot battery chargers and power supplies

Mascot offer a wide range of power supplies, desktop and wall chargers:
*   AC/AC Power Supplies
*   AC/DC Power Supplies
*   DC/DC Converters
*   DC/AC Inverters
*   Lithium-Ion, LifePO4, NiMH and Lead Acid Battery Chargers
